name: Littelfuse, Inc.
description: Littelfuse, Inc. is a diversified industrial technology manufacturing company that empowers a sustainable, connected, and safer world. Headquartered in Chicago, Illinois, the company designs, manufactures, and sells a wide range of electronic components, modules, and subassemblies across its Electronics, Transportation, and Industrial segments. With over 95 years of experience and a global presence in more than 20 countries, Littelfuse partners with customers to deliver innovative and reliable solutions that address critical challenges in power management, sensing, and protection, supporting industries ranging from automotive and consumer electronics to industrial automation and renewable energy.
